revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - remove commas
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from initialism
  |name=From an initialism
  |from=an initialism
  |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the initialism{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=** Use {{tl|R from acronym}} ''instead'' for abbreviations that are pronounced as words, such as NATO and RADAR.
** Use {{tl|R from short name}} ''instead'' for the initials of a person's name.
  |main category=Redirects from initialisms
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from initialism
  |name=From an initialism
  |from=an initialism
  |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the initialism{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=** Use {{tl|R from acronym}} ''instead'' for abbreviations that are pronounced as words, such as NATO and RADAR.
** Use {{tl|R from short name}} ''instead'' for the initials of a person's name.
  |main category=Redirects from initialisms
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from initialism |name=From an initialism |from=an initialism |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the initialism{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Use {{tl|R from acronym}} ''instead'' for abbreviations that are pronounced as words, such as NATO and RADAR. ** Use {{tl|R from short name}} ''instead'' for the initials of a person's name. |main category=Redirects from initialisms }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from initialism
  |name=From an initialism
  |from=an initialism
  |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the initialism{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=** Use {{tl|R from acronym}} ''instead'' for abbreviations that are pronounced as words, such as NATO and RADAR.
** Use {{tl|R from short name}} ''instead'' for the initials of a person's name.
  |main category=Redirects from initialisms
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from initialism |name=From an initialism |from=an initialism |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the initialism{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Use {{tl|R from acronym}} ''instead'' for abbreviations that are pronounced as words, such as NATO and RADAR. ** Use {{tl|R from short name}} ''instead'' for the initials of a person's name. |main category=Redirects from initialisms }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from initialism |name=From an initialism |from=an initialism |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the initialism{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Use {{tl|R from acronym}} ''instead'' for abbreviations that are pronounced as words, such as NATO and RADAR. ** Use {{tl|R from short name}} ''instead'' for the initials of a person's name. |main category=Redirects from initialisms }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from initialism |name=From an initialism |from=an initialism |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the initialism{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Use {{tl|R from acronym}} ''instead'' for abbreviations that are pronounced as words, such as NATO and RADAR. ** Use {{tl|R from short name}} ''instead'' for the initials of a person's name. |main category=Redirects from initialisms }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from initialism |name=From an initialism |from=an initialism |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the initialism{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Use {{tl|R from acronym}} ''instead'' for abbreviations that are pronounced as words, such as NATO and RADAR. ** Use {{tl|R from short name}} ''instead'' for the initials of a person's name. |main category=Redirects from initialisms }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from initialism |name=From an initialism |from=an initialism |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the initialism{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Use {{tl|R from acronym}} ''instead'' for abbreviations that are pronounced as words, such as NATO and RADAR. ** Use {{tl|R from short name}} ''instead'' for the initials of a person's name. |main category=Redirects from initialisms }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
